title: More Nonsense Limerick 97
content:
There was an old person of Bude,
    Whose deportment was vicious and crude;
    He wore a large ruff 
    Of pale straw-colored stuff,
    Which perplexed all the people of Bude.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 97"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
